slides.heading: Staging + commit = snapshot
slides.body:
1. **`git status`** sees what changed.
2. **`git add`** selects files for the next snapshot.
3. **`git commit -m "message"`** saves the snapshot with a readable label.
bullets: You need ≥1 tracked change before committing

slides.heading: Run the trilogy
slides.body:
```bash
git status
git add .
git commit -m \"snapshot one\"
```
